title: schoenoplectus juncoides subsp. triangulatus
intro: Schoenoplectus juncoides subsp. triangulatus, also known as the triangular club-rush, is a type of wetland plant belonging to the cattail family (Typhaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Schoenoplectus juncoides subsp. triangulatus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to support digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into infusions or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
